formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\underset{w \in W \left(h , r\right) \cap V^{t} : w_{1} \preceq w \prec w_{3}}{\sum} z_{t w} + \underset{w \in W \left(h , r\right) \cap V^{p} : w_{2} \preceq w \prec w_{4}^{'}}{\sum} z_{p w} \leq 1 , t , p \in T \cup T_{n e w} , \\ r = \left(h , i\right) \in R^{t} \cap R^{p} , \\ w_{1} , w_{3} \in W \left(h , r\right) \cap V^{t} , w_{2} , w_{4}^{'} \in W \left(h , r\right) \cap V^{p} , \\ v_{1}^{'} \in U \left(i , r\right) \cap V^{t} , v_{2}^{'} , v_{4} \in U \left(i , r\right) \cap V^{p} : \\ w_{1} \preceq w_{2} , v_{2}^{'} \preceq v_{1}^{'} , \\ \left(w_{1} , v_{1}^{'}\right) \in A^{t} , \left(w_{2} , v_{2}^{'}\right) \in A^{p} , \\ \Delta \left(v_{1}^{'} , w_{1}\right) = l_{t}^{h , i} , \\ \Delta \left(v_{2}^{'} , w_{2}\right) = l_{p}^{h , i} + a c c_{p} + d e c_{p} , \\ \Delta \left(v_{4} , w_{4}^{'}\right) = l_{p}^{h , i} + a c c_{p} + d e c_{p} , \\ \Delta \left(w_{3} , w_{2}\right) = d_{h} , \Delta \left(v_{4} , v_{1}^{'}\right) = a_{i}\end{matrix}
